matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Education (Transforming Practice) PACES entry only is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: This popular course offers a flexible blended learning approach for full or part time education practitioners at different stages in their career who are interested in developing and transforming their practice. Education practitioner is construed as a broad term to encompass not just teachers in school settings, but teachers in other educational contexts and professionals whose work is located in education settings such as counsellors, those who work with school assessment etc.
